task_text: Wie viel Geld haben wir seit Beginn von December 2025 mit der Servicezeile 'operator  workflow discovery sprint' verdient? Antworte nur mit einer Zahl.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system per root rule, read nested AGENTS in finance lanes, and used exact invoice line-item values.
function.outcome_justification: The exact service line 'operator workflow discovery sprint' appears in four invoices; restricting to records issued since 2025-12-01 includes INV-0002 (185), INV-0003 (185), and INV-0004 (650), totaling 1020.
